findings.location: sections s6, s7, s8 — hints arrays
findings.description: The PascalCase class `Success` is used as the return value (`return new Success()`) in the code examples of s6 (doHeader), s7 (doData), and s8 (doTrailer), but it is absent from the hints of all three sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `return new Success();` appears in doHeader (s6), doData (s7), and doTrailer (s8) code blocks.
